answers: Start skateboarding: learn to stand, push, and stop first. Practice on flat smooth ground before trying tricks.
Beginner tricks: ollie (fundamental trick), kickturn, manual (wheelie), tic-tac. Master ollie before anything else.
Tips: wear helmet and pads, keep weight centered, practice pushing with both feet, and don't rush tricks.
Skateboarding gear: complete board for beginners ($50-100), helmet, and pads. Upgrade parts as you improve.
